briefdescription.para: Feature is supported, but disabled.
Feature is supported and enabled.
Feature is not supported, and cannot be enabled.
Bluetooth Mesh feature states.
Enable or disable sending of the Secure Network Beacon.

parameterdescription.para: New Secure Network Beacon state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Secure Network Beacon state.

simplesect.para: Whether the Secure Network Beacon feature is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable sending of the Mesh Private beacon.

detaileddescription.para: Support for the Private beacon state must be enabled with CONFIG_BT_MESH_PRIV_BEACONS.

parameterdescription.para: New Mesh Private beacon state. Must be one of BT_MESH_FEATURE_ENABLED and BT_MESH_FEATURE_DISABLED.
Successfully changed the Mesh Private beacon feature state.
The Mesh Private beacon feature is not supported.
Invalid parameter.
Already in the given state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Mesh Private beacon state.

simplesect.para: The Mesh Private beacon feature state.

briefdescription.para: Set the current Mesh Private beacon update interval.

detaileddescription.para: The Mesh Private beacon's randomization value is updated regularly to maintain the node's privacy. The update interval controls how often the beacon is updated, in 10 second increments.

parameterdescription.para: Private beacon update interval in 10 second steps, or 0 to update on every beacon transmission.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Mesh Private beacon update interval.

detaileddescription.para: The Mesh Private beacon's randomization value is updated regularly to maintain the node's privacy. The update interval controls how often the beacon is updated, in 10 second increments.

simplesect.para: The Private beacon update interval in 10 second steps, or 0 if the beacon is updated every time it's transmitted.

briefdescription.para: Set the default TTL value.

detaileddescription.para: The default TTL value is used when no explicit TTL value is set. Models will use the default TTL value when bt_mesh_msg_ctx::send_ttl is BT_MESH_TTL_DEFAULT.

parameterdescription.para: The new default TTL value. Valid values are 0x00 and 0x02 to BT_MESH_TTL_MAX.
Successfully set the default TTL value.
Invalid TTL value.

briefdescription.para: Get the current default TTL value.
Get the current Mesh On-Demand Private Proxy state.

parameterdescription.para: or positive value represents On-Demand Private Proxy feature state
The On-Demand Private Proxy feature is not supported.

briefdescription.para: Set state of Mesh On-Demand Private Proxy.

detaileddescription.para: Support for the On-Demand Private Proxy state must be enabled with BT_MESH_OD_PRIV_PROXY_SRV.

parameterdescription.para: New Mesh On-Demand Private Proxy state. Value of 0x00 means that advertising with Private Network Identity cannot be enabled on demand. Values in range 0x01 - 0xFF set interval of this advertising after valid Solicitation PDU is received or client disconnects.
Successfully changed the Mesh On-Demand Private Proxy feature state.
The On-Demand Private Proxy feature is not supported.
Invalid parameter.
Already in the given state.

briefdescription.para: Set the Network Transmit parameters.

detaileddescription.para: The Network Transmit parameters determine the parameters local messages are transmitted with.

parameterdescription.para: New Network Transmit parameters. Use BT_MESH_TRANSMIT for encoding.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Network Transmit parameters.

detaileddescription.para: The BT_MESH_TRANSMIT_COUNT and BT_MESH_TRANSMIT_INT macros can be used to decode the Network Transmit parameters.

briefdescription.para: Configure the Relay feature.

detaileddescription.para: Enable or disable the Relay feature, and configure the parameters to transmit relayed messages with.
Support for the Relay feature must be enabled through the CONFIG_BT_MESH_RELAY configuration option.

parameterdescription.para: New Relay feature state. Must be one of BT_MESH_FEATURE_ENABLED and BT_MESH_FEATURE_DISABLED.
New Relay retransmit parameters. Use BT_MESH_TRANSMIT for encoding.
Successfully changed the Relay configuration.
The Relay feature is not supported.
Invalid parameter.
Already using the given parameters.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Relay feature state.
Get the current Relay Retransmit parameters.

detaileddescription.para: The BT_MESH_TRANSMIT_COUNT and BT_MESH_TRANSMIT_INT macros can be used to decode the Relay Retransmit parameters.

simplesect.para: The current Relay Retransmit parameters, or 0 if relay is not supported.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the GATT Proxy feature.

detaileddescription.para: Support for the GATT Proxy feature must be enabled through the CONFIG_BT_MESH_GATT_PROXY configuration option.

simplesect.para: The GATT Proxy feature only controls a Proxy node's ability to relay messages to the mesh network. A node that supports GATT Proxy will still advertise Connectable Proxy beacons, even if the feature is disabled. The Proxy feature can only be fully disabled through compile time configuration.

parameterdescription.para: New GATT Proxy state. Must be one of BT_MESH_FEATURE_ENABLED and BT_MESH_FEATURE_DISABLED.
Successfully changed the GATT Proxy feature state.
The GATT Proxy feature is not supported.
Invalid parameter.
Already in the given state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current GATT Proxy state.
Enable or disable the Private GATT Proxy feature.

detaileddescription.para: Support for the Private GATT Proxy feature must be enabled through the CONFIG_BT_MESH_PRIV_BEACONS and CONFIG_BT_MESH_GATT_PROXY configuration options.

parameterdescription.para: New Private GATT Proxy state. Must be one of BT_MESH_FEATURE_ENABLED and BT_MESH_FEATURE_DISABLED.
Successfully changed the Private GATT Proxy feature state.
The Private GATT Proxy feature is not supported.
Invalid parameter.
Already in the given state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Private GATT Proxy state.

simplesect.para: The Private GATT Proxy feature state.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the Friend feature.

detaileddescription.para: Any active friendships will be terminated immediately if the Friend feature is disabled.
Support for the Friend feature must be enabled through the CONFIG_BT_MESH_FRIEND configuration option.

parameterdescription.para: New Friend feature state. Must be one of BT_MESH_FEATURE_ENABLED and BT_MESH_FEATURE_DISABLED.
Successfully changed the Friend feature state.
The Friend feature is not supported.
Invalid parameter.
Already in the given state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current Friend state.
Runtime Configuration.
